Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:weapontype here].

====== Class WeaponType ======
===== See also: =====
[[Lua global#weapon_random|weapon_random]], [[Lua weapon#type|Weapon:type]], [[Lua player#select_weapons|Player:select_weapons]]

===== ammo =====
<pre>
 ammo()
</pre>

Returns the amount of [[#ammo]] for this weapon type when reloaded.

===== name =====
<pre>
 name()
</pre>

Returns the [[#name]] of this weapon type.

===== next =====
<pre>
 next()
</pre>

Returns the [[#next]] weapon type after this one.

===== prev =====
<pre>
 prev()
</pre>

Returns the previous weapon type after this one.

===== reload_time =====
<pre>
 reload_time()
</pre>

Returns the time it takes for this weapon type to reload.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618080830/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:weapontype -->
